_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to talk about different stories and connect them to our own experiences and feelings.

_source.w: We are learning to talk about different stories and connect them to our own experiences and feelings.
y: Connecting stories to our lives makes reading more meaningful and personal.
Sharing our responses helps us learn from each other's perspectives.
This builds our love of reading and our understanding of the world.
eg: We read a story and share something from our own life that it reminds us of.
We tell a partner how a character's experience is similar to or different from ours.
We discuss our favourite part of a story and explain why it stood out to us.
We write or draw a personal connection to a story we heard.
We compare two stories and talk about which one we connected with more.
We discuss how a story made us feel and whether anyone else felt the same way.
